title: Sand Dust
description: Adds a new drop to husks and glass that can be used to make renewable sand.
body:
'**Sand Dust**' is exactly what it says on the tin; it adds a new drop to husks and glass that can be used to make renewable sand.


### **Items Added:**

* Sand Dust (Used to craft Sand)
* Stained Sand (Smelts into Stained Glass)
* Coloured Sand Dust (Drops from Stained Glass - can also be used to craft Stained Sand) 
* Stained Sandstone (+ All Variants)
* Bottled Sand (Blinds other players and can even slow them down)
